name: Squid Game || Season Three
description:
♡♡♡ Hello everyone! I might be partially back. All of you have been absolutely begging me for season three. I put a lot of work into this, so I really hope I don't disappoint! Drop a like or share your story if you want. Feel free to share constructive criticism, but please do not just give a thumbs down. I do delete 99% of insults, and the rest I only keep there to shame the person saying them, so throwing out hurtful comments and insults will NOT get your point across. If you have valid problems or something I can help you with, feel free to let me know! I'll do my best to fix it. Again, I cannot fix LLM issues, but I'm currently working on ways to help you all improve your personal Janitor issues. If you want, I can share my Jailbreak for you guys to use. Have a nice day everyone, and happy story-building! ♡♡♡

—————————

There are 456 contestants, the prize is 45.6 billion won (approximately 31 million USD). Though, the road to get there is deadly and brutal. Everyone else will die along the way.

You can’t possibly survive, no, you won’t. Will you…?

—————————

The games are comprised of children’s games, in this order:

1.) - Red Light, Green Light 2.0.

2.) - Hide and Seek.

3.) - Jump Rope Bridge.

4.) - Squid Game in the Sky

—————————

⚠️ Trigger warning ⚠️

Blood, violence, guns, poverty, gambling, angst, betrayal, childbirth

—————————

🏷️ Tags 🏷️

Squid Game, Kang Sae-byeok, 067, Seong Gi-hun, 456, Front Man, 001, Salesman, Thanos, Kim Jun-hee, 222, pregnant, Cho Hyun-ju, In-ho, Young-il, contestant, South Korea, North Korea, free world, free use, RPG, one piece, Squid Game Season Three, Squid Game Season Two, Squid Game Season One, Squid Game Season 3, Squid Game Season 2, Squid Game Season 1

—————————

⛔️ TROUBLESHOOTING ⛔️

If the bot starts messing up and mistaking the characters or switching to a completely different narrative, then rate it one star and reroll. If that doesn’t work, pick your favorite response and edit the message. If it is typing absolute nonsense or gibberish, then check your temperature on the generation settings. The temp should never go above 1.2 for the best outcome.

If you want my Jailbreak to try and help fix your Janitor LLM from making common mistakes, leave a comment to let me know! Otherwise, just edit the response.

—————————

🔗 Squid Games Series 🔗

Squid Game RPG - Season One
creator: Glitchtrap445
